phase.name: Local AI portability and daily-use integration

model_runtime.message: Phase 6 is in progress through IMP-060. Offline Ollama session import, explicit text-only loopback capture, the accepted bounded local-portability migration drill, the deterministic shutdown escape bundle, the bounded selected-history ChatGPT conversations.json source adapter, and deterministic numbered ChatGPT conversation-member aggregation are implemented. PORT-001, PORT-003, bounded PORT-013, PORT-014, and PORT-015 pass with their required evidence levels. The complete Phase 6 gate, target-specific application replacement, and stable general anti-lock-in remain incomplete.
